description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with an olive green canvas upper, featuring white contrast stitching and a white rubber sole. The shoe displays bold, stylized text reading 'ARNT footwear' in white and yellow camouflage print along the side panels, giving it a distinctive urban streetwear aesthetic. The laces are white and arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, threading through metal eyelets. The toe cap and sole are textured for grip, with the sole wrapping slightly up the front and sides for added durability. The interior appears to be lined with a light gray or white fabric for comfort. A small circular logo patch is visible on the tongue, and there is a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing.
description: Olive green high-top sneaker with white laces, bold 'ARNT footwear' branding, and a white rubber sole. Features camouflage accents and a circular logo patch on the tongue.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white laces in a criss-cross pattern, the circular logo patch on the tongue, and the rounded toe cap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the 'ARNT footwear' branding in white and camouflage, the white side stripe, and the full length of the white rubber sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel pull tab, the back seam with white stitching, and a small circular detail at the base of the heel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the branding, side stripe, and the clean lines of the shoe's profile.
attribute_logo: Circular logo patch on the tongue, white with a black symbol inside
